gates.rationale: Runbook includes install, enable, disable, cron mode recommendation, Telegram smoke test, rollback, and no-npm verification.

gates.command_or_check: python3 -m py_compile scripts/office_watchdog_cron.py scripts/office_watchdog_cron_install.py && python3 scripts/office_watchdog_cron_install.py status
gates.rationale: Scripts compile, use no-agent/dry-run behavior, and status reports the copied runner plus matching cron job without secrets.

gates.gate: Persistent watchdog enabled safely and reversibly
gates.command_or_check: python3 scripts/office_watchdog_cron_install.py install --schedule 'every 30m' --deliver local; python3 scripts/office_watchdog_cron_install.py status
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: install exit 0; status exit 0; job c8638b67326b scheduled every 30m, no_agent=true, deliver=local
gates.rationale: The cron job was actually created and is reversible via disable/remove. It uses local delivery rather than Telegram because current board findings would generate repeated external alerts until smoke-tested.

gates.gate: Cron no-agent vs LLM-driven recommendation documented
gates.command_or_check: manual content check in docs/office-superpowers/DEPLOYMENT.md section 'Recommended cron mode'
gates.rationale: Runbook recommends no-agent for high-frequency watchdog and reserves LLM-driven cron for lower-frequency digest/summarization.

gates.gate: Telegram smoke-test instructions documented without secrets
gates.command_or_check: manual content check in docs/office-superpowers/DEPLOYMENT.md section 'Telegram smoke-test instructions'
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: artifact section present; Doctor reports telegram_configured=false without printing credentials
gates.rationale: Instructions are present and redact-sensitive. Live Telegram delivery was not enabled because Telegram is not configured for this devops profile and current board alert volume would spam.

gates.command_or_check: python3 scripts/office_watchdog_cron_install.py status plus runbook rollback section
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: status exit 0; rollback commands documented: disable/remove
gates.rationale: Rollback path is pause-first and full removal is explicit.

gates.command_or_check: git status --short -- docs/office-superpowers/DEPLOYMENT.md scripts/office_watchdog_cron.py scripts/office_watchdog_cron_install.py package.json package-lock.json pnpm-lock.yaml yarn.lock
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: exit 0; only the new docs/scripts are untracked in scoped status; no package/lockfile changes
gates.rationale: Only Python/file tooling was used for implementation and verification; no npm/pnpm/yarn/npx commands or JS package mutations were required.

gates.gate: Regression tests for related Office/Cron behavior pass
gates.rationale: Targeted tests cover Office superpowers helpers and no-agent cron/tool behavior.
